chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3675 - وَ قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ أَخَذَ عَلَى تَعْلِيمِ اَلْقُرْآنِ أَجْراً كَانَ حَظَّهُ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3675 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Whoever takes payment for teaching the Quran, his share will be [taken] on the Day of Judgment."
